heading: Set AWS Credentials
body:
After you configure AWS (Amazon Web Services) IAM authentication, copy your connection string
from the Atlas UI. Remove the `<AWS access key>:<AWS secret key>`
section from your connection string, because the driver reads these credentials
from environment variables. In your project's `serverless.yml` file, set the
`MONGODB_URI` environment variable to this modified connection string,
as shown in the following code:

```yaml
provider:
   environment:
      MONGODB_URI: "<connection string without credentials>"
```

codeBlocks.content:
provider:
   environment:
      MONGODB_URI: "<connection string without credentials>"
